author: @70agrr
text: I'm a big lad  with a bit of a hilly commute of about 8 miles, am seriously looking to get one of these, a lot of bike for the price

author: @3D_Printing
text: 1:27 Jump = turn the throttle up full and peddle as quick as possible :)

author: @3D_Printing
text: 0:37 Do car Drives read the Laws or obey the Laws

author: @____________________________.x
text: As an old coot I tried cycling down a mud pile on a building site. Naturally my centre of gravity was too high and I tipped over the handlebars and face planted at the bottom with the bike on top of me… 😹 Later I bought a better mountain bike and went off on a Red trail, which was way beyond my skills but good fun. I look forward to getting an e-Bike one day and making this process a bit easier

author: @stevetobias4890
text: They look like they lack suspension, my butt would be sore after a few hours riding.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: they have front suspension - but it is just a bike mate - when I was a kid your butt was the only suspension a bike had lol

replies.author: @stevetobias4890
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering I have a boney butt so I look at seat suspension

author: @roberthopgood1894
text: what are the changes to the laws

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I think it is the order of right of way - cyclist are now preeminent - I believe if you a hit a cyclist for any reason it is now prime facia the drivers fault

author: @carmichaelmoritz8662
text: 👍  This brings back great memories of when I used to go biking on the trails . Unfortunately having three whiplash's , back, and hip shoulder injurie's now prevents me from doing so.  😢.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: oooo - nasty sorry to hear that mate

author: @Zodliness
text:
British law surrounding the restrictions imposed on electric bikes and especially  'power assisted' bicycles, is at best laughable and undermines our very rights and freedoms. It's the equivalent of saying, because a small minority of irresponsible fools can't be trusted to own higher power bicycles, everyone has to suffer as a result.

F*CK THOSE CORRUPT TORY CRIMINALS! 🤬

author: @saifcathum3423
text: I had fun riding my e-bike downtown Ottawa a few weeks ago. Despite the snow, ice and sub zero temperature I just had to get some helmet cam footage riding around downtown with all the trucks. All wheel drive and studded ice tires help.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: that actually sounds like a lot of fun mate

author: @karlmyers6518
text:
Lol can you just get on the bike and hop over that puddle.

author: @blueredbrick
text: Ok I'm enjoying seeing the projects you guys do now the same as ever, but what is with the fluor jackets and helmets on a bike haha?? Are you a danger to your surroundings or what. Love from Nl.

replies.text: oh mate - you have no idea of the earache I would get from viewers if I didn't wear them!

author: @ProlificInvention
text: You've inspired me to go out today and ride my 1000 watt hub motor mountain bike with a 20ah 48 volt battery.  Love all your videos

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: wow - nice bike mate - go for it - we had fun!
